inline_comments.message:
looks good,

just one suggestion, instead of surrounding big chunk of the code with "!=null", check for null, log the error and return immediately.
Good idea but out of scope for SDC-2905. Maybe create another task for that?
As mentioned previously, this is a good idea but a bit out of scope for SDC-2905. Maybe create another task for it?

The initial goal of this change was to prevent a NullPointerException to be thrown if line 137 was getting called and `containerV` was null.
The `catch` statement related to the NPE would then not be able to catch this.
